properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 73/23
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 1. M/V RAMFORM ATLAS / LART8 IS TOWING SEISMIC CABLES IN AN AREA BOUNDED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:

 A. 65-50.0N 008-01.0E
 B. 64-15.4N 008-09.4E
 C. 63-31.5N 007-02.0E
 D. 65-52.7N 005-42.0E
 E. 64-27.6N 005-41.4E
 F. 64-57.3N 005-33.0E
 G. 65-50.8N 006-40.7E
 H. 65-50.0N 008-01.0E

 RAMFORM ATLAS IS TOWING 14 CABLES OF 6NM IN LENGTH, AND 1 NM WIDTH .
 RAMFORM ATLAS REQUESTS A WIDE BERTH OF ALL PASSING VESSELS OF 3NM AHEAD, 3NM ABEAM AND 8NM ASTERN.
 SUPPORT VESSELS ARE: RIG ANDROMEDA / V7AU4 AND TESS / YJUV8
 ALL VESSELS ARE MONITORING VHF CH. 16 AND 72
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 39/23
